t1.quote: Within three months, our qualified leads doubled. The team runs our Meta campaigns with a level of rigor we didn't have in-house.
t1.author: Karim B.

t2.quote: Reels and landing pages clearly improved lead quality. We get fewer inquiries, but far more relevant ones.
t2.author: Salma E.

t3.quote: Weekly reporting and creative recommendations helped us lower cost per lead while increasing volume.
t3.author: Youssef A.

t4.quote: We had tried several vendors. Moutaoua is the only one that speaks acquisition, content and enrollment journeys fluently.
t4.author: Nadia L.

t5.quote: WhatsApp and email automation changed how we handle warm leads. Our sales team saves hours every week.
t5.author: Mehdi R.

t6.quote: Transparent numbers, creatives tailored to our audience and day-to-day responsiveness — exactly what we expect from a partner agency.
t6.author: Imane T.
